  • May 2025

    • Wed 28
    28/05/2025 - 01/06/2025

    European Championships 2025

    Plovdiv, Bulgaria Tsar Boris III Obedinitel Blvd 37, Plovdiv, Bulgaria

    Please join us at the European Championships for Veteran Fencers 2025 in Plovdiv, Bulgaria. Please find the invitation letter attached. Registration for the Championships goes via your national representative or Head of Delegation. Please look at the members list to find your national representative, or contact your national federation for details. There is no possibility […]

    €95

    Sat 12
    12/07/2025 @ 17:00 CEST

    Musketeers of Bratislava Castle

    Bratislava Castle Bratislava, Slovakia (Slovak Republic)

    Rain Date: July 13, 2025, same time. (If neither day is suitable for holding the event outdoors, the competition will be held indoors at the Sermu Fencing Club, Jánossomorja.) All registered participants will be notified by e mail/SMS at least 24 hours in advance in case of change. See the attached invitation

    Mon 28
    28/07/2025 - 01/08/2025

    Veteran Fencing Camp Valencia

    Valencia Valencia

    Tailored for Foil and Epee, coach Pilar Delgado is the camp manager and website details for the camp can be found at https://fencingvalencia.es/

  • September 2025

    • Sat 13
    13/09/2025 @ 16:30 - 20:30 CEST

    Outdoor Fencing Event at the Pantheon – Rome (ITA)

    Pantheon - Rome Pantheon, Piazza della Rotonda, Roma, Italy

    An outdoor fencing event will be organised in Rome by the Pantheon on Saturday, September 13th. The event will take place from 16:30 until 20:30. No registration is required, the fencers who want to participate may go directly to the location between 16:30 and 20:30 and register by the organisers. There is a dressing room […]

    Free
